tags.name: fab-menu
tags.description:
A floating action button that toggles a menu of actions.

Slots:

  * `object Object],[object Object],[object Object` {} - 

Attributes:

  * `icon` - [object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object]

  * `opened-icon` - The icon to display when the menu is open.
Defaults to 'close'.

  * `size` {`"small" | "medium" | "large"`} - The size of the FAB.
Can be 'small', 'medium', or 'large'.
Defaults to 'medium'.

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Whether the menu is currently open.

  * `variant` {`"surface" | "primary" | "secondary" | "tertiary"`} - The variant of the FAB.
Can be 'surface', 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.
Defaults to 'primary'.

  * `label` {`string`} - [object Object],[object Object],[object Object]

  * `aria-label` {`string`} - The `aria-label` of the FAB.

  * `direction` {`"start" | "end"`} - The direction in which the menu items should expand.

Properties:

  * `styles` - [object Object],[object Object]

  * `_fab` - 

  * `_scrim` {`HTMLDivElement`} - 

  * `_items` - 

  * `icon` - [object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object]

  * `openedIcon` - The icon to display when the menu is open.
Defaults to 'close'.

  * `size` {`"small" | "medium" | "large"`} - The size of the FAB.
Can be 'small', 'medium', or 'large'.
Defaults to 'medium'.

  * `_focusableElements` - 

  * `_handleDocumentClick` - 

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Whether the menu is currently open.

  * `variant` {`"surface" | "primary" | "secondary" | "tertiary"`} - The variant of the FAB.
Can be 'surface', 'primary', 'secondary', or 'tertiary'.
Defaults to 'primary'.

  * `label` {`string`} - [object Object],[object Object],[object Object]

  * `ariaLabel` {`string`} - The `aria-label` of the FAB.

  * `object Object],[object Object],[object Object` - 

  * `direction` {`"start" | "end"`} - The direction in which the menu items should expand.
